text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Process 'payload.exe' is not a standard Windows binary and was executed from the Downloads folder. It performed extensive registry operations related to system certificates, including creating keys under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Policies\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates and HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates\\Disallowed, which is highly unusual and indicative of potential certificate store manipulation or trust bypass attempts.",
  "indicators": [
    "non-standard executable name",
    "execution from Downloads folder",
    "registry key creation",
    "system certificate manipulation",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Policies\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates\\Disallowed"
  ]
}
